title: Architecture Diagram Generator Configuration
description: Configuration file for the Architecture Diagram Generator. Controls which files are analyzed, how they are classified into layers and domains, and how the output diagrams are generated.

rootDir.description: Root directory of the project to analyze. Relative paths are resolved from the config file location.

include.description: Glob patterns for directories/files to include in analysis.

exclude.description: Glob patterns for files/directories to exclude from analysis. Takes precedence over include patterns.

layers.description: Custom architecture layer definitions. Each layer groups files matching the given glob patterns.

name.description: Human-readable layer name shown in the diagram (e.g., 'UI', 'API', 'Processing').

patterns.description: Glob patterns that match files belonging to this layer.

color.description: Hex color code used to style nodes in this layer.

domains.description: Functional domain groupings. Domains cut across layers and represent business capabilities.

patterns.description: Glob patterns that match files belonging to this domain.

critical.description: When true, marks this domain as critical with distinct visual styling.

externalServices.description: Known external services and APIs. Matched against detected fetch/axios calls and import patterns.

name.description: Friendly display name for the service shown in the diagram.

patterns.description: URL fragments or package names used to identify calls to this service.

type.description: Category of the external service for visual differentiation.

output.description: Controls how and where diagrams are generated.

formats.description: Output formats to generate: markdown (Mermaid), png, or svg.

directory.description: Directory where generated files are saved. Created automatically if it does not exist.

simplified.description: When true, generates a simplified high-level diagram showing only layers and key services.

detailed.description: When true, generates a detailed diagram showing all individual modules and their dependencies.

plugins.description: Plugin configurations. Plugins extend the generator with custom analysis or output capabilities.

name.description: Plugin identifier. Must match the plugin's registered name.
